race.comment: OSSIFIED (5) produced a good run two starts back to finish third but disappointed last time when out of the placings at Albury over 1500m after he was in the firing line on the corner. Ideally placed and can bounce back sharply with Loy taking over in the saddle. THEO'S CHOICE (6) improved a little finishing midfield last start at Corowa on soft going, capable of getting into the money. SECTORS (10) never really looked likely first-up at Wagga but steps up in distance 21 days between and with that run under her belt she can make her presence felt. THE CUBAN (1) creates some interest getting back out to 1400m today.
